questionHtml: Identify which of the following diagrams, A, B or C, represents the slope field for the differential equation. Give a reason for your answer.
markschemeHtml:
C.          A1

Any valid reason for accepting C. or rejecting A. and B.          R1

for example:

- when x=0 slopes have (or appear to have) zero gradient

- (slope field is) always positive for x>0

 

Note: Allow A1R0.         

[2 marks]
